data.title: Encryption
data.description: Spotify employs advanced encryption techniques to protect user data both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.2 for data in transit.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Strict access controls safeguard Spotify's infrastructure from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control (RBAC) combined with multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Continuous Monitoring
data.description: 24/7 security monitoring to detect and respond to potential threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Uses SIEM systems for anomaly detection and threat intelligence.

data.title: Incident Response
data.description: A well-defined incident response plan ensures quick mitigation of security threats.
data.technical_spec: Incident response team operates using playbooks and post-mortem analyses.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and penetration testing help identify and mitigate potential security flaws.
data.technical_spec: Automated vulnerability scanning tools complemented by manual pen tests.
